items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
items.snippet: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) received analyst upgrades in the past week, highlighting confidence in its lithium-focused business model. Research firms cited Albemarle's plans for expansion and productivity improvements as key factors. The company is viewed as well positioned to serve str

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond EVs
items.snippet: Albemarle CCO Eric Norris stated: 'Grid energy storage is more evenly distributed globally, which is a very interesting demand driver.' Energy storage demand growing 40% annually as a complement to EV demand. Rio Tinto plans to increase its lithium production capacity by 2028.

items.headline: Albemarle Dividend Stock with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral, PT $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said Albemarle is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds and that the market is not fully recognizing its long-term growth potential. R

items.headline: Albemarle — biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand, Citi Buy upgrade
items.snippet: Citi raised Albemarle to Buy, target price $225. Global ESS battery production forecast at ~950 GWh in 2026, up 35% YoY, expanding to ~1,300 GWh by 2027. Citi: market is underestimating Albemarle's growth potential despite recent weakness in spot lithium prices.

items.headline: Does Albemarle's Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand CAGR of 10-20% from 2025 to 2030. Energy Storage Systems production rose 117% YoY in Q1 2026. Operating cash flow was ~$1.3 billion in 2025, up ~86% from prior year. FCF of $248M in Q1 2026. Liquidity of ~$2.7 billion at end of Q1.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs. RBC stated it expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8 billion and $2.9 billion, respectively. Reiterated outperform
